function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system, read finance lane AGENTS, verified matches via invoice reads, and summed only records since 2025-12-01.
function.outcome_justification: Exact phrase matches were found in four invoices; only invoices issued on/after 2025-12-01 qualify. Qualified line_eur values are 185 (INV-0003, 2025-12-01) and 650 (INV-0004, 2026-01-17), totaling 835.
